violations.text: HACCP plan is not properly prepared HACCP plan is missing critical control points. A food establishment that is required under § 8-201.13 to have a HACCP PLAN, the PERMIT applicant or PERMIT HOLDER shall submit to the REGULATORY AUTHORITY a properly prepared HACCP PLAN. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

Establishment does not have a variance to process apple cider. Variance request must be submitted by the permit holder and approved as specified under § 8-103.11 to the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
